mapper.insert: insert into tb_user(userId, userPw, userName, userNick, userGender, userRegion, userWeight, userHeight) values(#{userId},#{userPw},#{userName},#{userNick},#{userGender},#{userRegion},#{userWeight},#{userHeight})
mapper.select: select postContent, postIdx, hashTag, userNick from tb_post inner join tb_user on tb_post.userId = tb_user.userId where postContent like #{keyWord} or hashTag like #{keyWord} or userNick like #{keyWord} order by postIdx desc limit 5
mapper.insert: insert into tb_comment (cmtContent, userId, cmtLikes) values(#{cmtContent}, #{userId}, #{cmtLikes})
